title: Block Counter
description: This is a mod for counting blocks
body:
This mod allows you to count blocks using certain commands.

The first one is in the following format :

`
/blockcounter countblocks <first_position_x> <first_position_y> <first_position_z> <second_position_x> <second_position_y> <second_position_z> [block to filter]
`

The second one is this :
`
/blockcounter setposition
`

Both commands count blocks within a certain area selected via the positions.
The difference between them is that the first one is manual and allows a block to filter.
The second one (setposition) needs to be done once at the first position and another time at the second position.
After the command is run the second time, the counting is executed.
